publishedRefreshWork.title: Illinois HB1844
publishedRefreshWork.summary: Illinois House bill to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Fund under the State Treasurer with donation, custody, holding-period, and reporting provisions.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Flagship state; registry entry must remain descriptive and distinct from the normative packet.

publishedRefreshWork.title: Maryland HB1389
publishedRefreshWork.summary: Maryland House bill to create a Maryland Bitcoin Reserve Fund, capitalized in part with certain seized gambling proceeds and invested only in bitcoin under State Treasurer custody rules.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Bitcoin reserve fund bill tied to seized-gambling proceeds, with official hearing and custody details on the Maryland General Assembly record.
publishedRefreshWork.status: In the House - Hearing 3/11 at 1:00 p.m. (Judiciary)

manifest.shortNote: Bitcoin reserve fund bill tied to seized-gambling proceeds, with official hearing and custody details on the Maryland General Assembly record.

publishedRefreshWork.title: North Carolina S327
publishedRefreshWork.summary: North Carolina Senate bill to establish a Bitcoin reserve, authorize the State Treasurer to allocate public funds into bitcoin, and expressly permit the reserve to back bonds for public projects.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Official reserve bill also contemplates Bitcoin-backed bond use, making it the clearest crossover signal in the expanded batch.
publishedRefreshWork.status: Ref To Com On Rules and Operations of the Senate

manifest.shortNote: Official reserve bill also contemplates Bitcoin-backed bond use, making it the clearest crossover signal in the expanded batch.

publishedRefreshWork.title: Missouri HB1217
publishedRefreshWork.summary: Missouri House bill to create a Bitcoin Strategic Reserve Fund, require a five-year holding period for contributed bitcoin, and broaden the State Treasurer's authority to invest in and hold cryptocurrency.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Bitcoin strategic reserve fund bill pairs direct treasury custody with a five-year holding rule and a completed House public hearing.

manifest.shortNote: Bitcoin strategic reserve fund bill pairs direct treasury custody with a five-year holding rule and a completed House public hearing.

publishedRefreshWork.summary: Oklahoma bill to create the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act and permit capped digital-asset investments by the State Treasurer and certain retirement funds.

publishedRefreshWork.title: South Carolina H4256
publishedRefreshWork.summary: South Carolina House bill to create a Strategic Digital Assets Reserve, authorize capped treasury investment in digital assets including bitcoin, and require custody, reporting, and donation procedures.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Strategic digital assets reserve bill would authorize capped treasury investment, donations, custody controls, and biennial reporting.
publishedRefreshWork.status: Referred to Committee on Ways and Means

publishedRefreshWork.title: New Hampshire BFA Bitcoin-Backed Bond Approval
publishedRefreshWork.summary: New Hampshire Business Finance Authority board approval of up to $100 million in bonds for a project to acquire and hold digital currency, framed publicly as a bitcoin-backed municipal bond.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Strongest official bond-side signal in the first batch; record type must remain explicit.
publishedRefreshWork.chamber: New Hampshire Business Finance Authority Board of Directors
publishedRefreshWork.status: Board approved; further approval and counsel condition pending

publishedRefreshWork.title: Michigan HB4087
publishedRefreshWork.summary: Michigan House bill to establish a strategic bitcoin reserve by allowing the State Treasurer to invest capped portions of the general fund and budget stabilization fund in cryptocurrency with regulated custody options.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Strategic bitcoin reserve bill would let the treasurer invest capped state funds in cryptocurrency through official custody channels.
publishedRefreshWork.status: Referred to Committee on Communications and Technology

publishedRefreshWork.title: Texas SB21
publishedRefreshWork.summary: Texas enacted the Texas Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and Investment Act, establishing a state reserve structure administered by the comptroller with defined custody, investment, and reporting rules.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: High-significance reserve-law benchmark for the first published batch.

firstPublicationCandidates.evidenceNote: Official Senate page identifies SB 550, its Bitcoin public-funds investment authority, companion HB 487, and terminal committee posture.
Official bill page identifies SB 352 as a bitcoin and digital assets reserve fund proposal with a terminal session posture.
Official overview page marks HB 1184 failed and describes digital asset and precious metal investment authority.
Official bill page identifies HB 18 as the Ohio Strategic Cryptocurrency Reserve Act and places it in the House Technology and Innovation Committee.
Official enrolled text and static bill page are available, but the entry should explain that final enacted content is broader digital-innovation legislation rather than a narrow Bitcoin-reserve bill.
